caption:
Google now shows customers how fast you reply.

Business Profile messaging displays your average response time right on your listing. Reply fast and it shows. Reply slow and it shows too.

Ignore messages for days at a stretch and Google disables your Message button automatically. The channel stays dark until you start responding again.

Most shops flip messaging on for the free leads, then stop checking it after a few weeks. A feature built to win business starts costing you visibility instead.

Leads answered within 5 minutes close at double the rate of leads answered 30 minutes later. Phone, text, or Google message, the math doesn't change.

Route every new channel to the inbox you already watch. Same speed standard, no exceptions.

Want calls, forms, and Google messages wired into one instant-response system?
DM "MESSAGE"

#ServiceBusiness #LocalSEO #HomeServices #LeadGeneration #GoogleBusinessProfile
rationale: Reframed around Google's documented, verifiable behavior (visible response-time tags and auto-disable on inactivity) instead of an unverified 'ranking factor' claim, so the hook stays fresh and current without shipping a fabricated update. Tightened logic, cut adverbs, and kept the core value: one speed standard across every lead channel.
